title: Phillip Love
compiled_truth: Phillip Love is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-13 to 2001-06-02), Phillip Love sent 1782 and received 642 emails, totalling 2424 interactions. Top correspondents: [Bruce Mills](people/bruce-mills) (244), [Victor Guggenheim](people/victor-guggenheim) (118), [Mjillard](people/mjillard-beaconelectric) (111), [Alove770](people/alove770-cs) (107), [Bryan Hull](people/bryan-hull) (106).
